LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_AssembleDesc: Call allied fingerspikes, trispikes, and toughspikes to fuse into a draftable segmented bastion.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_NoDonors: Not enough suitable allied fingerspikes, trispikes, or toughspikes are available.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_NoGatherCell: No reachable space found for the selected fleshbeasts to gather.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_Interrupted: The segmented bastion assembly was interrupted.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_AssemblyStarted: {0} fleshbeasts begin converging into a segmented bastion. Combined mass value: {1}.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_SplitDesc: Break this bastion into its surviving spine segments. Each segment keeps its original bastion identity.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_ReassembleDesc: Gather all surviving native segments of this bastion and fuse them back into the large form.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_InvalidSegment: This segment does not remember a bastion identity.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_SegmentTooDamaged: This segment is too damaged to reassemble.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_ReassemblyActive: This bastion group is already reassembling.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_NoSegments: No surviving native segments are available.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_RepairDesc: Order the nearest available fingerspike to embed itself into this bastion, restoring one missing segment or healing the worst surviving segment.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_RepairFullyHealthy: All bastion segments are fully healthy.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion_RepairCannotAct: The segmented bastion cannot receive a fingerspike repair right now.
